query_normalized: llmxive follow-up: extending "kwai keye-vl-2.0 technical report" computer science
rationale: This paper satisfies criteria (d) and (f) as a foundational survey and canonical reference for the domain of Multimodal Large Language Models (MLLMs), which is the specific technical context of the "Kwai Keye-VL-2.0" report the user is extending. It provides the necessary background on architectures, training strategies, and evaluation metrics that a literature review for a follow-up technical report would require to situate the new work within the broader field.
